About.Name: Hennie Francis
About.Title: Senior Full Stack Engineer | Senior Tech Lead
About.Section1: I believe if you have a passion for tech and a passion for what you do everday, you will never ''work'' a day in your life.
About.Section2: Currently my main stack is .NET, Java, IaC and Cloud Technologies. I always learn something new or explore a new technology.
About.Section3: When I'm not coding or fiddle with tech, I'm extremely passionate about flying aircrafts.  I am a true nerd by heart, I am a content creator on Twitch and also love playing games with my wife.  When we don't play games, we enjoy to travel, explore new places and eat good food.

Biography.Section1: Residing in the vibrant city of Cape Town, South Africa, Hennie Francis is a driving force in the world of technology.
Biography.Section2: Hennie Francis is a highly experienced Senior Software Engineer with a vision as an aspiring Solutions Architect at Capitec Bank, and he concurrently serves as the CEO of his own technology startup, dotcore Solutions. With over 18 years of extensive commercial experience, his journey reflects a remarkable fusion of innovation and expertise.
Biography.Section3: His core belief is that when you have a genuine passion for technology and a profound love for your daily work, it never truly feels like ''work''
Biography.Section4: What truly ignites his enthusiasm is the opportunity to acquire new knowledge, tackle seemingly insurmountable challenges, or simply immerse himself in technology throughout the day. He relishes attending technology events and socializing with fellow tech enthusiasts. He proudly embraces the FOMO mindset and freely admits to being a dedicated collector of tech-related swag. After all, who can resist the allure of free swag?
Biography.Section5: Hennie's impressive credentials include 2 AWS Certifications and an astounding 19 Microsoft Certifications. He holds the prestigious titles of Microsoft Certified Trainer and Microsoft Technology Specialist.
